description: Today's pick is Lemon, drawn from the culinary traditions of Haiti.

Celebrating Lancashire Day, a tribute to the UK's rich northern heritage. These Cheddar Shallot chips offer a savory, creamy nod to this special day.

event_name: Proclamation of Independence Day (Timor-Leste), celebrating the declaration of independence of the Democratic Republic of East Timor from Portugal in 1975.

description: Honoring Republic Day, our Feta Olive chips celebrate the union of classic Mediterranean flavors. A savory tribute to history on this day.
